title: Falcon  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Custom Button Device Settings shows "Microsoft Teams" selected by default and "Other Providers" greyed out when Teams is detected by Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Open Device Settings by tapping on the connected [Device Name].
4. Locate and tap on the Custom Button option in the Device Settings menu.
5. Observe the two options displayed: "Microsoft Teams" and "Other Providers".
6. Verify that "Microsoft Teams" is selected by default.
7. Verify that "Other Providers" is greyed out and not tappable.
8. Check for the informational message indicating that Microsoft Teams is connected and Other Providers is not available.
expected: The Custom Button UI shows two options: "Microsoft Teams" (selected by default) and "Other Providers" (greyed out). A message indicates that Microsoft Teams is connected and Other Providers is not available. Tapping "Other Providers" does nothing.
